description: Built-in Role definitions and their permission sets

Viewer.description: Read-only access to graphs and templates

Editor.description: Can edit graph structure but not execute

Executor.description: Can execute graphs and view traces

graph:write.description: Modify graph structure (add/edit/delete nodes and edges)

graph:execute.description: Execute graph and view execution results

graph:admin.description: Administrative operations on graphs (delete, archive, etc.)

node:lock.description: Lock nodes to prevent edits by others

node:unlock.description: Unlock nodes (including unlocking nodes locked by others)

template:register.description: Register new templates in the operator registry

template:admin.description: Administrative operations on templates (delete, deprecate, etc.)

scope_hierarchy.description: Permission scope inheritance from most specific to most general
scope_hierarchy.inheritance_rule: Permissions granted at a higher scope apply to all lower scopes
